channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 13.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Murrell used false accounting and fake invoices to hide SNP embezzlement, court hears – UK politics live
item.description: Murrell used false accounting and fake invoices to hide SNP embezzlement, court hears – UK politics live

item.title: The Guardian: Keir Starmer - The Guardian
Independent UK Politics: Andy Burnham accuses water companies of ‘profiteering’ during cost-of-living crisis
item.description: Andy Burnham accuses water companies of ‘profiteering’ during cost-of-living crisis

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Mandelson should never have been ambassador, Yvette Cooper says after damning messages revealed
item.description: Mandelson should never have been ambassador, Yvette Cooper says after damning messages revealed

item.title: Sky News Politics: Epstein survivor urges Starmer to meet victims after latest Mandelson files released
item.description: Epstein survivor urges Starmer to meet victims after latest Mandelson files released

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour ‘not looking to raise taxes to fund benefits’ as Mandelson messages suggest
item.description: Labour ‘not looking to raise taxes to fund benefits’ as Mandelson messages suggest

item.title: FT UK Politics: Mandelson files fire up row over taxes ‘to pay benefits’
item.description: Mandelson files fire up row over taxes ‘to pay benefits’

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): UK government has failed Palestinian people, says senior Labour MP
item.description: UK government has failed Palestinian people, says senior Labour MP

item.title: Bloomberg.com: Burnham Says He Won’t Call Early Election If He Replaces Starmer - Bloomberg.com
item.description: Burnham Says He Won’t Call Early Election If He Replaces Starmer - Bloomberg.com

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: This week's column: the policy detail from Tony Blair is almost always not worth your time (even in government he did the big picture stuff). But the big picture criticism is right, even tho in many ways the biggest S...
item.description: This week's column: the policy detail from Tony Blair is almost always not worth your time (even in government he did the big picture stuff). But the big picture criticism is right, even tho in many ways the biggest S...
